adjudication_notes: One completed claude-opus-4-8 max read-only/no-tools review is recorded for CP00-010.
Claude returned approve/PASS with zero P0, zero P1, and zero P2 findings.
The firm-level null branch note is non-blocking and deferred to a later test-hardening pack because adding tests after review would change the reviewed diff.
The naming note is a pre-existing convention and requires no code change because validator, fixture, contract, and tests are internally consistent.
The expected pre-evidence RP00 failure is resolved by creating this CP00-010 evidence and rerunning final validation.
